/usr/bin/gcc -O3 -march=native -mtune=native -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/mmg3d.dir/src/common/apptools.c.o CMakeFiles/mmg3d.dir/src/mmg3d/mmg3d.c.o -o bin/mmg3d_O3  -Wl,-rpath,/home/marco/Kratos/applications/MeshingApplication/custom_external_libraries/mmg/build/lib: lib/libmmg3d.so.5.7.0 -lm
